Đúng, output đó “nhỏ xíu” vì pipeline thật sự đã xuất gần như rỗng, không phải lỗi `npx http-server`.

Manifest nói rõ:

- `keptCount: 13`
- `filterClusterRemovedCount: 4,325,310`
- `scene.sog: 12 KB`
- `occlusion.glb: 864 bytes`
- `collision/navmesh triangles: 0`

Root cause: pipeline đã `alignment`/scale splats trước, nhưng `filterCluster.seedPos` và `voxelCarve.seedPos` vẫn dùng tọa độ gốc. Với garden của bạn, `unitScale=0.29437152`, nên seed `[-1.264, 5.013, -4.566]` bị lệch khỏi scene đã scale, rồi code snap sang voxel gần nhất và giữ đúng một cụm bé 13 splats.

Tôi đã sửa trong [pipeline.rs](./crates/core-lib/src/pipeline.rs:82):

- transform `filterCluster`, `filterSphere`, `filterBox` coordinates bằng `AlignmentTransform` trước khi filter.
- transform `voxelCarve.seedPos` trước khi `fill/carve`.
- thêm regression test `alignment_is_applied_to_downstream_seed_coordinates`.

Verification đã pass:

```bash
cargo test -p augmented-gaussian-core
cargo test --workspace
```

Bạn cần bake lại `garden.ply`; folder `~/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden` hiện tại vẫn là output cũ bị lỗi. Sau khi bake lại, manifest không nên còn kiểu `keptCount: 13` / `Cluster Removed: 4,325,310` do seed alignment mismatch nữa.

Tôi sẽ sửa theo hướng backend nhận diện layout PLY và tạo preview `.splat` tạm cho PLY point cloud, đồng thời core reader cũng decode được point cloud bằng scale/opacity/rotation mặc định.

> from pathlib import Path
> import struct, math
> files=[Path('/home/nqd2/Downloads/colored-pointcloud 5.ply'), Path('/home/nqd2/Downloads/dogPark_med.ply')]
> for p in files:
>     data=p.read_bytes()
>     hs=data.find(b'end_header\n')+len(b'end_header\n')
>     header=data[:hs].decode('latin1')
>     props=[]; count=0; in_vertex=False
>     sizes={'float':4,'double':8,'uchar':1}
>     fmtmap={'float':'f','double':'d','uchar':'B'}
>     row=0
>     for line in header.splitlines():
>         parts=line.split()
>         if parts[:2]==['element','vertex']:
>             count=int(parts[2]); in_vertex=True
>         elif parts and parts[0]=='element':
>             in_vertex=False
>         elif in_vertex and parts[:1]==['property']:
>             props.append((parts[2],parts[1],row)); row+=sizes[parts[1]]
>     sample=min(count, 200000)
>     step=max(1,count//sample)
>     mins=[math.inf]*3; maxs=[-math.inf]*3
>     for i in range(0,count,step):
>         off=hs+i*row
>         vals={}
>         for name,ty,o in props:
>             vals[name]=struct.unpack_from('<'+fmtmap[ty], data, off+o)[0]
>         for j,n in enumerate(['x','y','z']):
>             mins[j]=min(mins[j], vals[n]); maxs[j]=max(maxs[j], vals[n])
>     diag=math.sqrt(sum((maxs[i]-mins[i])**2 for i in range(3)))
>     print(p.name, 'count',count,'row',row,'props',props,'sample bounds',mins,maxs,'diag',diag,'est spacing', diag/(count**(1/3)))
> PY`

Preview ảnh 1:

- PlayCanvas load PLY gốc.
- Scene Transform áp trực tiếp: position `y=4.55`, rotation `x=180`.
- Vẫn thấy đủ `85,329` splats.

Bake pipeline:

- export edited PLY `/tmp/...edited-78500-3.ply`
- apply alignment scale `unitScale=0.101578586`
- chạy `filterCluster`
- ghi `scene.sog`

Sai chính ở `filterCluster` seed:

`filterClusterRequestedSeed = [0.0245, 1.0, 0.0384]`

Seed này là điểm “air/free-space” cho `voxelCarve`, không phải seed nằm trong object cluster. Nó nằm 1m trên model sau scale, nên code snap xuống voxel gần nhất:

`[0.0245, 1.0, 0.0384] -> [-0.05, 0.05, 0.05]`

Kết quả:

- `85,329 -> 1,044` splats
- `Cluster Cells = 1`
- `scene.sog = 26KB`
- `collision_mesh.json = 68 bytes`
- `occlusion.glb = 864 bytes`

Nên ảnh 2 không phải transform sai kiểu xoay/translate. Nó là output bị filter gần hết.

Code lỗi logic ở [apps/gui/src/domains/calibration/index.ts](./apps/gui/src/domains/calibration/index.ts:70): `makeEditRecipe()` dùng cùng `seedPos` với carve. Với object nhỏ như cây, phải bỏ `filterCluster` mặc định hoặc dùng seed riêng nằm trong object, không dùng điểm 1m above floor.

> plan to fix pipeline, need to work

> Cần lock 2 quyết định. Sai hiện tại: `filterCluster` dùng air seed, cắt 85k -> 1k; `voxelCarve` dùng profile room cho object nhỏ, collision rỗng.
>
> User input response
>
> - Output nào phải đúng trước cho file cây 3DGS?
>   - Visual + Geometry (Recommended)
> - `filterCluster` mặc định nên xử lý sao?
>   - filter cluster là gì
>
> `filterCluster` = connected-component filter. Nó voxelize splats, tìm voxel chứa seed, giữ cụm nối với seed, xóa cụm khác/noise. Dùng seed sai -> giữ nhầm cục nhỏ. Với cây: seed hiện tại là air seed cho carve, không nằm trong thân/lá -> blob.
>
> Plan dùng mặc định: `filterCluster` off. Chỉ bật khi user có seed riêng nằm trong object. Need kiểm tra test GUI đang expect filterCluster.
>

> # Fix Object 3DGS Bake Pipeline Plan
>
> ## Summary
>
> Fix tree/object bake path so `scene.sog` matches preview object, not white blob. Root cause: GUI default recipe uses `filterCluster` with air/carve seed; pipeline keeps wrong tiny component. Default object bake must keep all splats, generate non-empty occlusion mesh, disable navmesh.
>
> ## Key Changes
>
> - Add GUI profile `object-prop`; make it default.
> - `object-prop` config:
>   - `voxel.size = 0.05`, `opacityThreshold = 0.1`
>   - `voxelFill.mode = "none"`
>   - `voxelCarve.enabled = false`
>   - `mesh.mode = "smooth"`
>   - `navmesh.enabled = false` with full required navmesh fields.
> - Change `makeEditRecipe()` default behavior: return `{ operations: [] }`; no `filterCluster` unless future UI provides separate solid/object seed.
> - Keep existing pipeline alignment transform behavior: downstream filter/carve coords stay in aligned coordinate space.
> - Update GUI profile labels:
>   - `Object / prop` default
>   - keep `Interior room`
>   - keep `Outdoor terrain`
> - Status remains same; expected `Cluster Removed = 0`, `Cluster Cells = 0` when no cluster filter.
>
> ## Tests
>
> - Add/update calibration unit tests:
>   - default profile is `object-prop`
>   - object config disables carve and navmesh
>   - object recipe has empty operations
>   - interior/outdoor recipes also do not inject `filterCluster` by default
> - Update GUI e2e expectations:
>   - serialized recipe `editRecipe.operations` equals `[]`
>   - default config profile has `voxelCarve.enabled=false`, `navmesh.enabled=false`
>   - no expectation for `filterCluster.seedPos`
> - Add/keep Rust pipeline regression:
>   - no edit recipe keeps all input splats
>   - object-style config produces `keptCount == splatCount`
>   - `filterClusterInputCount == 0`
>   - collision mesh has triangles for simple synthetic object.
> - Run:
>   - `cargo test --workspace`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
>   - optional: `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`
>
> ## Acceptance
>
> - Bake `/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply` to `~/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`.
> - Manifest expected:
>   - `source.splatCount = 85329`
>   - `source.keptCount` near `85329`
>   - `filterClusterInputCount = 0`
>   - no `filterCluster seed resolved...` warning
>   - `scene.sog` much larger than `26KB`
>   - `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge > 0`
>   - no navmesh warning for object profile.
> - WebAR preview expected: tree/plant shape, not white blob.
>
> ## Assumptions
>
> - Chosen target: Visual + Geometry.
> - `filterCluster` default off. It is dangerous without separate solid seed.
> - Point-cloud PLY load errors (`obj_info`, missing `scale_0`) separate plan; not included here.
>
> Plan implementation
>
> Status: completed
>

> # Fix Object 3DGS Bake Pipeline Plan
>
> ## Summary
>
> Fix tree/object bake path so `scene.sog` matches preview object, not white blob. Root cause: GUI default recipe uses `filterCluster` with air/carve seed; pipeline keeps wrong tiny component. Default object bake must keep all splats, generate non-empty occlusion mesh, disable navmesh.
>
> ## Key Changes
>
> - Add GUI profile `object-prop`; make it default.
> - `object-prop` config:
>   - `voxel.size = 0.05`, `opacityThreshold = 0.1`
>   - `voxelFill.mode = "none"`
>   - `voxelCarve.enabled = false`
>   - `mesh.mode = "smooth"`
>   - `navmesh.enabled = false` with full required navmesh fields.
> - Change `makeEditRecipe()` default behavior: return `{ operations: [] }`; no `filterCluster` unless future UI provides separate solid/object seed.
> - Keep existing pipeline alignment transform behavior: downstream filter/carve coords stay in aligned coordinate space.
> - Update GUI profile labels:
>   - `Object / prop` default
>   - keep `Interior room`
>   - keep `Outdoor terrain`
> - Status remains same; expected `Cluster Removed = 0`, `Cluster Cells = 0` when no cluster filter.
>
> ## Tests
>
> - Add/update calibration unit tests:
>   - default profile is `object-prop`
>   - object config disables carve and navmesh
>   - object recipe has empty operations
>   - interior/outdoor recipes also do not inject `filterCluster` by default
> - Update GUI e2e expectations:
>   - serialized recipe `editRecipe.operations` equals `[]`
>   - default config profile has `voxelCarve.enabled=false`, `navmesh.enabled=false`
>   - no expectation for `filterCluster.seedPos`
> - Add/keep Rust pipeline regression:
>   - no edit recipe keeps all input splats
>   - object-style config produces `keptCount == splatCount`
>   - `filterClusterInputCount == 0`
>   - collision mesh has triangles for simple synthetic object.
> - Run:
>   - `cargo test --workspace`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
>   - optional: `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`
>
> ## Acceptance
>
> - Bake `/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply` to `~/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`.
> - Manifest expected:
>   - `source.splatCount = 85329`
>   - `source.keptCount` near `85329`
>   - `filterClusterInputCount = 0`
>   - no `filterCluster seed resolved...` warning
>   - `scene.sog` much larger than `26KB`
>   - `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge > 0`
>   - no navmesh warning for object profile.
> - WebAR preview expected: tree/plant shape, not white blob.
>
> ## Assumptions
>
> - Chosen target: Visual + Geometry.
> - `filterCluster` default off. It is dangerous without separate solid seed.
> - Point-cloud PLY load errors (`obj_info`, missing `scale_0`) separate plan; not included here.

Done.

Changed:

- Default bake profile now `object-prop`.
- `object-prop`: no fill, no carve, navmesh off, smooth mesh.
- `makeEditRecipe()` now emits `operations: []`; no default `filterCluster`.
- GUI profile selector now has `Object / prop`.
- E2E updated for scale-only calibration.
- Rust regression added: object config keeps all splats, no cluster counters, collision mesh non-empty.

Verified:

- `cargo test --workspace` pass
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui test` pass
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build` pass
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e` pass, 5/5

Acceptance bake rerun to `/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`:

- `splatCount: 85329`
- `keptCount: 85329`
- `filterClusterInputCount: 0`
- `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge: 88`
- `scene.sog: 1,343,657 bytes`
- no collision warnings

Note: repo already dirty. I only touched relevant files; no staging/commit.

> Local manifest hiện không còn thiếu scene: `scene.sog=1.34MB`, `keptCount=85329`. Nhưng collision vẫn rỗng vì `voxelCarve.enabled=true` trong run hiện tại, seed `[0.024,1,0.038]` không navigable. Need plan: match splat-transform carve behavior/options + avoid stale profile.
>

> - Ran `python3 - <<'PY'
> import urllib.request
> base='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/main/'
> files=[
> 'src/lib/voxel/carve.ts',
> 'src/lib/voxel/voxelize.ts',
> 'src/lib/voxel/filter-pipeline.ts',
> 'src/lib/voxel/filter-cluster.ts',
> 'src/lib/voxel/fill-exterior.ts',
> 'src/lib/mesh/voxel-faces.ts',
> 'src/lib/writers/collision-glb.ts',
> 'bin/splat-transform.mjs',
> 'README.md',
> ]
> for f in files:
>  print('\n---', f, '---')
>  try:
>   text=urllib.request.urlopen(base+f, timeout=15).read().decode('utf-8')
>   lines=text.splitlines()
>   for i,line in enumerate(lines[:220],1):
>    print(f'{i}: {line}')
>  except Exception as e:
>   print('ERR', e)
> PY`
>
> </details>
>
> Khác lớn với `splat-transform`: khi seed ngoài grid / blocked/no free cell, nó **skip carve and returns original grid**, không xuất empty collision. Code mình hiện return empty grid -> `occlusion.glb=864`, `collision_mesh.json=68`.

> Plan
>
> # Fix Splat-Transform Parity Pipeline
>
> ## Summary
>
> Current output is missing because two issues remain:
>
> - Old/default `filterCluster` path created the tiny `scene.sog` blob. Current repo already disables default cluster; local manifest now shows `keptCount=85329` and `sceneSogBytes=1343657`.
> - Collision is still empty because our carve returns an empty grid when seed is blocked/outside. `splat-transform` skips carve and keeps the original grid in that case, per PlayCanvas blog `-K` flow and upstream `carve.ts`.
>
> Sources: [PlayCanvas blog](https://blog.playcanvas.com/turning-a-gaussian-splat-into-a-videogame/), [splat-transform](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform), [carve.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/carve.ts), [fill-exterior.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/fill-exterior.ts).
>
> ## Key Changes
>
> - Match `splat-transform` carve semantics in `/home/nqd2/code/augmented-gaussian/crates/core-lib/src/processing/voxel.rs`:
>   - If carve seed is outside grid: return original grid, warning only.
>   - If seed is blocked and no free cell is found nearby: return original grid, warning only.
>   - Only return empty when carve actually finds no navigable region after flood-fill, same as upstream.
>   - Keep filter/carve coordinates in aligned space.
>
> - Match `splat-transform` exterior-fill semantics:
>   - If seed is outside grid: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - If seed is reachable from boundary: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - Do not clamp seed for fill/carve decisions.
>
> - Fix GUI stale profile trap:
>   - Keep default profile `object-prop`.
>   - Add one-time localStorage migration/version for `ag_bake_geometry_profile`, so old saved `interior-room` does not silently keep carve/navmesh enabled for object bakes.
>   - Labels stay: `Object / prop`, `Interior room`, `Outdoor terrain`.
>
> - Add zero-geometry guard:
>   - For Visual + Geometry bake, do not silently succeed with `occlusion.glb` at 864 bytes and `collision_mesh.json` at 68 bytes.
>   - If collision triangles are zero after parity carve fallback, surface an actionable bake error/warning in manifest/status.
>
> ## Tests
>
> - Rust:
>   - `voxelCarve` outside seed returns original solid grid.
>   - `voxelCarve` blocked seed with no nearby free cell returns original solid grid.
>   - No edit recipe keeps all splats: `keptCount == splatCount`, `filterClusterInputCount == 0`.
>   - Object-style config produces non-empty collision triangles for synthetic object.
>
> - GUI unit/e2e:
>   - Default profile is `object-prop`.
>   - Serialized `editRecipe.operations` is `[]`.
>   - Default config has `voxelCarve.enabled=false`, `navmesh.enabled=false`.
>   - LocalStorage migration resets stale/default `interior-room` to object profile unless user explicitly changes it after migration.
>
> - Commands:
>   - `cargo test --workspace`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`
>
> ## Acceptance
>
> Bake `/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply` to `/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`.
>
> Expected:
>
> - `source.splatCount = 85329`
> - `source.keptCount` near `85329`
> - `filterClusterInputCount = 0`
> - No `filterCluster seed resolved...` warning
> - No `exported empty collision instead of raw grid` warning
> - `scene.sog` around current full size, not `26950 bytes`
> - `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge > 0`
> - `occlusion.glb > 864 bytes`
> - No navmesh warning for `object-prop`
> - WebAR preview shows plant/tree shape, not white blob.
>
> ## Assumptions
>
> - Chosen parity target: semantic parity with `splat-transform`, not shelling out to upstream CLI.
> - Keep object profile `mesh.mode = "smooth"` from the existing plan; exact byte-identical collision tessellation is out of scope.
> - Point-cloud PLY loader errors like `obj_info` / missing `scale_0` are separate.
>
> Plan implementation
>
> Status: completed
>
> # Fix Splat-Transform Parity Pipeline
>
> ## Summary
>
> Current output is missing because two issues remain:
>
> - Old/default `filterCluster` path created the tiny `scene.sog` blob. Current repo already disables default cluster; local manifest now shows `keptCount=85329` and `sceneSogBytes=1343657`.
> - Collision is still empty because our carve returns an empty grid when seed is blocked/outside. `splat-transform` skips carve and keeps the original grid in that case, per PlayCanvas blog `-K` flow and upstream `carve.ts`.
>
> Sources: [PlayCanvas blog](https://blog.playcanvas.com/turning-a-gaussian-splat-into-a-videogame/), [splat-transform](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform), [carve.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/carve.ts), [fill-exterior.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/fill-exterior.ts).
>
> ## Key Changes
>
> - Match `splat-transform` carve semantics in `/home/nqd2/code/augmented-gaussian/crates/core-lib/src/processing/voxel.rs`:
>   - If carve seed is outside grid: return original grid, warning only.
>   - If seed is blocked and no free cell is found nearby: return original grid, warning only.
>   - Only return empty when carve actually finds no navigable region after flood-fill, same as upstream.
>   - Keep filter/carve coordinates in aligned space.
>
> - Match `splat-transform` exterior-fill semantics:
>   - If seed is outside grid: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - If seed is reachable from boundary: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - Do not clamp seed for fill/carve decisions.
>
> - Fix GUI stale profile trap:
>   - Keep default profile `object-prop`.
>   - Add one-time localStorage migration/version for `ag_bake_geometry_profile`, so old saved `interior-room` does not silently keep carve/navmesh enabled for object bakes.
>   - Labels stay: `Object / prop`, `Interior room`, `Outdoor terrain`.
>
> - Add zero-geometry guard:
>   - For Visual + Geometry bake, do not silently succeed with `occlusion.glb` at 864 bytes and `collision_mesh.json` at 68 bytes.
>   - If collision triangles are zero after parity carve fallback, surface an actionable bake error/warning in manifest/status.
>

>   - `voxelCarve` blocked seed with no nearby free cell returns original solid grid.

>   - Object-style config produces non-empty collision triangles for synthetic object.

>   - Default config has `voxelCarve.enabled=false`, `navmesh.enabled=false`.
>   - LocalStorage migration resets stale/default `interior-room` to object profile unless user explicitly changes it after migration.
>
> - Commands:
>   - `cargo test --workspace`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`
>
> ## Acceptance
>
> Bake `/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply` to `/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`.
>

> - `filterClusterInputCount = 0`
> - No `filterCluster seed resolved...` warning
> - No `exported empty collision instead of raw grid` warning
> - `scene.sog` around current full size, not `26950 bytes`
> - `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge > 0`
> - `occlusion.glb > 864 bytes`
> - No navmesh warning for `object-prop`
> - WebAR preview shows plant/tree shape, not white blob.
>
> ## Assumptions
>
> - Chosen parity target: semantic parity with `splat-transform`, not shelling out to upstream CLI.
> - Keep object profile `mesh.mode = "smooth"` from the existing plan; exact byte-identical collision tessellation is out of scope.
> - Point-cloud PLY loader errors like `obj_info` / missing `scale_0` are separate.

> # Fix Splat-Transform Parity Pipeline
>
> ## Summary
>
> Current output is missing because two issues remain:
>
> - Old/default `filterCluster` path created the tiny `scene.sog` blob. Current repo already disables default cluster; local manifest now shows `keptCount=85329` and `sceneSogBytes=1343657`.
> - Collision is still empty because our carve returns an empty grid when seed is blocked/outside. `splat-transform` skips carve and keeps the original grid in that case, per PlayCanvas blog `-K` flow and upstream `carve.ts`.
>
> Sources: [PlayCanvas blog](https://blog.playcanvas.com/turning-a-gaussian-splat-into-a-videogame/), [splat-transform](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform), [carve.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/carve.ts), [fill-exterior.ts](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/fill-exterior.ts).
>
> ## Key Changes
>
> - Match `splat-transform` carve semantics in `/home/nqd2/code/augmented-gaussian/crates/core-lib/src/processing/voxel.rs`:
>   - If carve seed is outside grid: return original grid, warning only.
>   - If seed is blocked and no free cell is found nearby: return original grid, warning only.
>   - Only return empty when carve actually finds no navigable region after flood-fill, same as upstream.
>   - Keep filter/carve coordinates in aligned space.
>
> - Match `splat-transform` exterior-fill semantics:
>   - If seed is outside grid: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - If seed is reachable from boundary: skip exterior fill, return original grid.
>   - Do not clamp seed for fill/carve decisions.
>
> - Fix GUI stale profile trap:
>   - Keep default profile `object-prop`.
>   - Add one-time localStorage migration/version for `ag_bake_geometry_profile`, so old saved `interior-room` does not silently keep carve/navmesh enabled for object bakes.
>   - Labels stay: `Object / prop`, `Interior room`, `Outdoor terrain`.
>
> - Add zero-geometry guard:
>   - For Visual + Geometry bake, do not silently succeed with `occlusion.glb` at 864 bytes and `collision_mesh.json` at 68 bytes.
>   - If collision triangles are zero after parity carve fallback, surface an actionable bake error/warning in manifest/status.
>
> ## Tests
>
> - Rust:
>   - `voxelCarve` outside seed returns original solid grid.
>   - `voxelCarve` blocked seed with no nearby free cell returns original solid grid.
>   - No edit recipe keeps all splats: `keptCount == splatCount`, `filterClusterInputCount == 0`.
>   - Object-style config produces non-empty collision triangles for synthetic object.

>   - Serialized `editRecipe.operations` is `[]`.
>   - Default config has `voxelCarve.enabled=false`, `navmesh.enabled=false`.
>   - LocalStorage migration resets stale/default `interior-room` to object profile unless user explicitly changes it after migration.
>

>   - `cargo test --workspace`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
>   - `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`

> Bake `/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply` to `/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`.

Implemented.

Changed:

- [voxel.rs](./crates/core-lib/src/processing/voxel.rs:410): `exterior-fill` now skips and keeps the raw grid when seed is outside/reachable from boundary.
- [voxel.rs](./crates/core-lib/src/processing/voxel.rs:467): `voxelCarve` now matches `splat-transform` semantics: outside/blocked seed keeps raw grid instead of exporting empty geometry.
- [pipeline.rs](./crates/core-lib/src/pipeline.rs:242): added explicit warning when collision mesh has 0 triangles.
- [index.ts](./apps/gui/src/domains/calibration/index.ts:8) and [useCalibration.ts](./apps/gui/src/hooks/useCalibration.ts:32): added profile storage version migration so stale `interior-room` localStorage resets to `object-prop`.

Matched behavior against PlayCanvas [`splat-transform`](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform), especially upstream [`carve.ts`](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/carve.ts) and [`fill-exterior.ts`](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform/blob/main/src/lib/voxel/fill-exterior.ts).

Verification passed:

- `cargo test --workspace`
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui test`
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui run build`
- `pnpm --dir apps/gui run test:e2e`

Acceptance bake completed to `/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/garden`:

- `splatCount=85329`, `keptCount=85329`
- `filterClusterInputCount=0`
- `scene.sog=1,349,868 bytes`
- `occlusion.glb=1,716 bytes`
- `collision_mesh.json=2,587 bytes`
- `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge=40`
- `collisionWarnings=[]`

WebAR screenshot now shows the plant shape, not the old white blob:

![WebAR output](/tmp/augmented-gaussian-garden.png)

Note: `cargo fmt --check` still fails on pre-existing dirty Rust formatting in unrelated Tauri files under `apps/gui/src-tauri`; I did not rewrite those because the repo was already dirty.

> ar ouput

> sau đó dùng npx http-server + playwritght để xem thử, chụp ảnh rồi đánh giá và sửa nếu cần

> page.screenshot(path=str(out), full_page=True)

> import { chromium } from 'playwright';
> const url = 'http://127.0.0.1:8124/index.html';
> const out = '/tmp/augmented-gaussian-tree.png';
> const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true });
> const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1280, height: 720 }, deviceScaleFactor: 1 });
> const logs = [];
> page.on('console', msg => logs.push(`${msg.type()}: ${msg.text()}`));
> page.on('pageerror', err => logs.push(`pageerror: ${err.message}`));
> await page.goto(url, { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
> await page.waitForTimeout(5000);
> await page.screenshot({ path: out, fullPage: true });
> const text = await page.locator('body').innerText();
> console.log('screenshot', out);
> console.log('body_text_start');
> console.log(text.slice(0, 1000));
> console.log('body_text_end');
> console.log('console_start');
> for (const line of logs) console.log(line);
> console.log('console_end');
> await browser.close();
> JS``
>
> </details>
>
> Headless Chromium lần đầu báo `webgl clientWaitSync sync failed`/context lost. Đây có thể là lỗi renderer headless, không phải artifact. Tôi mở screenshot và thử lại với flags WebGL ổn hơn.
>
> ![Image](</tmp/augmented-gaussian-tree.png>)
>
> Ảnh cho thấy asset không bị mất nhưng browser headless bị context-lost giữa lúc load SOG. Tôi chạy lại bằng Playwright CLI chuẩn như lần trước để loại trừ lỗi script/console hook.
>
> <details><summary>Ran 1 command</summary>

> Đây không còn là pipeline/filter issue: manifest đúng, nhưng viewer báo `clientWaitSync`. Tôi so sánh bytes output `tree` với output `garden` đã hiển thị tốt trước đó để tách artifact vs browser/runtime.
>
> <details><summary>Explored 1 search, ran 2 commands</summary>

> `scene.sog` và `index.html` của `tree` byte-identical với `garden`; vậy artifact không hỏng. Tôi thử các Chromium WebGL flags để xem đây là lỗi headless renderer hay viewer code cần fallback.
>
> <details><summary>Ran 1 command</summary>
>
> - Ran ``pnpm --dir apps/gui exec node --input-type=module <<'JS'
> import { chromium } from 'playwright';
> const attempts = [
>   { name: 'default', args: [] },
>   { name: 'swiftshader', args: ['--use-gl=swiftshader', '--enable-unsafe-swiftshader'] },
>   { name: 'egl', args: ['--use-gl=egl', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist'] },
>   { name: 'angle-gl', args: ['--use-angle=gl', '--ignore-gpu-blocklist'] },
>   { name: 'disable-gpu', args: ['--disable-gpu'] },
> ];
> for (const attempt of attempts) {
>   const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true, args: attempt.args });
>   const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1280, height: 720 } });
>   const logs = [];
>   page.on('console', msg => logs.push(`${msg.type()}: ${msg.text()}`));
>   page.on('pageerror', err => logs.push(`pageerror: ${err.message}`));
>   await page.goto('http://127.0.0.1:8124/index.html', { waitUntil: 'networkidle' });
>   await page.waitForTimeout(4000);
>   const text = await page.locator('body').innerText();
>   await page.screenshot({ path: `/tmp/tree-${attempt.name}.png`, fullPage: true });
>   console.log(`=== ${attempt.name} ===`);
>   console.log(text.split('\n').slice(0, 6).join(' | '));
>   console.log(logs.filter(line => line.includes('error') || line.includes('CONTEXT_LOST') || line.includes('clientWaitSync')).join('\n'));
>   await browser.close();
> }
> JS``
>
> </details>
>
> Kết quả rõ: default/SwiftShader/EGL headless fail, nhưng `--use-angle=gl` và `--disable-gpu` load đủ 3 assets. Đây là runtime Playwright/headless flag, không phải pipeline. Tôi mở screenshot pass.
>
> ![Image](</tmp/tree-disable-gpu.png>)
>
> Screenshot pass: cây/plant hiện đúng, không còn blob trắng, file list đúng. Tôi tắt `http-server` rồi sẽ kết luận.
</details>

Đã chạy đúng quy trình với output mới:

Input:
`/home/nqd2/Downloads/3dgsply-tre/source/3DGS_ply TRE/3DGS.ply TRE.ply`

Output:
`/home/nqd2/Downloads/augmented-gaussian/tree`

Kết quả manifest tốt:

- `splatCount = 85329`
- `keptCount = 85329`
- `filterClusterInputCount = 0`
- `scene.sog = 1,349,868 bytes`
- `occlusion.glb = 1,716 bytes`
- `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge = 40`
- `collisionWarnings = []`

File output:

- `scene.sog`
- `occlusion.glb`
- `collision_mesh.json`
- `manifest.json`
- `index.html`
- `webar.zip`

Screenshot pass:

![tree output](/tmp/tree-disable-gpu.png)

Đánh giá: pipeline OK, không cần sửa code thêm. Object hiện đúng dạng cây/plant, không còn blob trắng.

Ghi chú test Playwright: Chromium headless default bị lỗi renderer `webgl clientWaitSync sync failed`. Artifact không hỏng. Khi chạy Playwright nên dùng một trong hai flag này:

- `--disable-gpu`
- hoặc `--use-angle=gl --ignore-gpu-blocklist`

`npx http-server` đã tắt sau khi test.

> các thông số hardcoded có lí do chứ?  giải thích

<details><summary>1 previous message</summary>

> Tôi sẽ giải thích theo từng nhóm thông số: cái nào là tham số thuật toán thật, cái nào chỉ để schema/UI, và cái nào là calibration riêng của file cây test.
</details>

Có. Nhưng cần tách 2 loại:

**1. Hardcoded hợp lý cho profile `Object / prop`**
Các giá trị này là default an toàn cho object 3DGS, không phải cho room/navmesh:

- `voxel.size = 0.05`
  Dựa theo flow `splat-transform`/PlayCanvas. Đây là voxel resolution 5cm. Nhỏ hơn thì collision chi tiết hơn nhưng nặng hơn; lớn hơn thì object nhỏ như thân cây/chậu dễ mất hình.

- `opacityThreshold = 0.1`
  Cũng theo `--voxel-params 0.05,0.1`. Nó bỏ splat quá mờ khi tạo collision mesh, giảm noise/floater. Visual `scene.sog` vẫn giữ đủ splats, threshold này chỉ ảnh hưởng geometry.

- `voxelFill.mode = "none"`
  Object/prop không cần fill exterior/floor. `exterior-fill` hợp room kín; `floor-fill` hợp terrain. Với cây/chậu, fill có thể tạo geometry giả.

- `voxelCarve.enabled = false`
  Đây là fix chính. Carve cần seed “air/walkable space”. Với object nhỏ, seed rất dễ nằm ngoài/blocked, nên carve có thể làm rỗng collision. Object profile phải giữ raw voxel mesh.

- `navmesh.enabled = false`
  Cây/chậu không phải mặt phẳng đi lại. Bật navmesh chỉ sinh warning hoặc 0 triangles.

- `mesh.mode = "smooth"`
  Dùng marching-cubes style mesh, đỡ blocky hơn voxel faces. Với occlusion AR nhìn hợp hơn.

**2. Hardcoded chỉ vì schema yêu cầu**
Các field này vẫn có trong config dù disabled:

```json
"agentHeight": 1.6,
"agentRadius": 0.2,
"seedPos": [0, 1, 0]
```

Khi `voxelCarve.enabled=false` và `navmesh.enabled=false`, chúng không ảnh hưởng output object. Giữ lại để config shape đầy đủ, không phá deserialize/schema/UI.

**3. Hardcoded riêng cho file test cây**
Đoạn này là calibration cho input cụ thể:

```json
"scalePoints": [[-1.229, 0, 0.249], [1.713, 0, 0.508]],
"scaleDistanceMeters": 0.3
```

Nó lấy từ điểm scale bạn đã pick trong GUI. Mục đích là map object về tỷ lệ thật: đoạn giữa 2 điểm đó tương ứng `0.3m`. Nếu đổi source khác thì không nên hardcode lại y nguyên; phải pick/calibrate lại.

Tóm lại: `0.05/0.1/no fill/no carve/no navmesh` là default hợp lý cho object profile. `scalePoints/scaleDistance` là dữ liệu calibration theo từng file, không phải default chung.

> occlusion mesh in pic 2 is quite chunky?
>
> User context
>
> Images:
>
> - `data:image/png;base64,`
> - `data:image/png;base64,`

Yes. Pic 2 is chunky because current object profile produces a **collision/occlusion proxy**, not a reconstructed visual mesh.

Current bake stats explain it:

- `voxel.size = 0.05m`
- `voxelSolidCells = 5`
- `collisionTrianglesAfterMerge = 40`

So the mesh is literally built from only a few occupied voxels. Marching-cubes smooths those cells, but it cannot recover leaf/stem detail if only 5 cells survive voxelization.

Why this happens:

- 3DGS splats are fuzzy/transparent, not a dense watertight surface.
- `opacityThreshold = 0.1` keeps only strong splats for geometry.
- Thin leaves/stems often contribute weak/sparse occupancy.
- 5cm voxel resolution is coarse for a small plant.

For AR, this may be acceptable if the mesh is only used as invisible occlusion/collision. But visually previewed in cyan, yes, it looks too chunky.

To improve it:

- Try `voxel.size = 0.025` or `0.02`.
- Maybe lower `opacityThreshold` to `0.05`.
- Expect bigger `occlusion.glb`, more triangles, slower bake.
- Best UI fix: add an `Object detail` control:
  - `Fast`: `0.05 / 0.1`
  - `Balanced`: `0.03 / 0.08`
  - `Fine`: `0.02 / 0.05`

For this tree, I’d test `voxel.size=0.025`, `opacityThreshold=0.05` first.
